title: Pyschological Mess [Horror]
body:
# PHYSCOLOGICAL MESS👁‍
"Sanity is just the beginning"

<details>
## <summary>🛑MANUAL INSTALLS RECOMMENDED🛑(for the best experience)</summary>

**- Excalibur|Corpse** [(Resource Pack)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-corpse-support)

**- Horor Ambience Music** [(Resource Pack)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/horror-ambience-music)

**- The Masked** [(Mod)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/disturbed)

</details>



Minimum Ram Allocation💾: 4GB

I can assure you that the shaders look a lot better in game!
- ## Introduction
Made with the intention of adressing the issue of "annoying ≠ scary". I am highly confident in this modpack's horror factor, try it out.

- ## ‼️Features
  - Customized Spawn Rates
  - Optimized Experience
  - Custom Terrain Generation
  - Lore. (Structural)
  - Progressive Agressiveness
  - Custom Tools, Weapons, and Backpacks
  - Total Immersion & Enhanced Visuals
  - Added Ambience
  - Extra QOL features
  - Custom Shaderpack
  - Simple Voice Chat
 
<details>
<summary>⛰️Mods Used</summary>

**- Backpacks** - [Sophisticated Backpacks ](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks/versions)

**- Tools** - [Spartan's Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry/versions) | [Spartan's Shields](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-shields/versions) | [Azure Paxels](https://modrinth.com/mod/azure-paxels)

**- Terrain** - [WWOO](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo)
</details>



##  IMPORTANT
1. This modpack is still in early development and may be buggy. But I'm still working on a way for you guys to report bugs to me, sorry :(
3. I highly recommend installing the required resource packs and mod, **simple download and drag into either your resources or mod folders.** Thank you
4. You can also play this pack in multiplayer using Essentials server hosting **(Please make sure you and the person you're playing with has the EXACT same mods or else it will not work)**
5. I also highly recommend playing this with **all sound on and using the built in shaderpack. (For the full experience and immersion)**
6. Also it's worth mentioning that this modpack is slow paced and requires patience. Like I said it'll get progressively more agressive
7. For those who are confused about recipes I have JEI built in.
8. Play with Voice Chat.. (Keybind configuration is up to you, so I highly recommend checking it)


Other than that. Enjoy :)

Please contact me on @duki.doo on discord to report anything wrong, I'll try my best to help


<details>
<summary>🛑Spoiler🛑</summary>

- > [Boy and The Bath](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bath)
- > [From The Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/from-the-cave/versions)
- > [The Anomally](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-anomaly-rephased)
- > [The Boiled One](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-boiled-one-reimagined)
- > [Who's There?[Ghost Players]](https://modrinth.com/mod/whos-there-ghost-players/version/rf6TqFVl)
- > [The Masked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/disturbed)

</details>
